title: Three ways to reach us
lead: The Sambalpur clinic is the main consultation point. Dr. Shristi also sees VIMSAR cases at the Burla consultation point (independent of SS Kidney Care). Our 24×7 emergency line is run by an independent partner physician.

emergency.label: 24×7 Emergency
emergency.title: Independent emergency partner
emergency.clarifier: For after-hours and acute emergencies. For routine appointments and nephrology consultations, please use the SS Kidney Care numbers above.

reason_options.appointment: I'd like to book an appointment

form.message_placeholder: Tell us a little so we can route this to the right person.

success.title: Thanks, {name}.
success.body: We'll get back within 24 hours. A copy has been sent to {email}.
